# Dusty Tome

## Observed Text

- Upon pickup, obtain Corruption.
- For Ironclad, the granted card was Corruption+.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- For Ironclad, prefer when the deck has several strong skills; Corruption+ can turn block/draw into free tempo and enable exhaust synergies.
